_comment: Contact page copy. The form's technical field names/ids stay in code — this file holds the headings, cards, contact details, and the thank-you message.

seo.title: Contact · Sakyadhita
seo.description: Get in touch with Sakyadhita International Association of Buddhist Women — general inquiries, branch contacts, press, and partnerships.

hero.title: Get in touch
hero.lede: We're a volunteer-run organization. We'll get back to you as soon as we can — usually within a week.

routing.heading: Route your message to the right team
routing.sub: Picking a category helps us reply faster.

cards.title: General inquiry
cards.text: Questions, comments, dharma offerings, general correspondence.

cards.title: Branch contact
cards.text: Looking for your local branch or chapter? See the directory.

cards.title: Press & partnerships
cards.text: Media inquiries, interview requests, partnership proposals.

blocks.label: Response time
blocks.value: We're volunteer-run — please allow up to a week for a reply. For urgent conference matters, contact the host organization directly.

success.title: Message sent
success.text: Thank you for reaching out. We're volunteer-run, so please allow up to a week for a reply.
